payload.rationale: Broader OS/platform ambitions created drift; the highest-leverage immediate value is better deliberation, better memory continuity, and better structural grounding.
payload.summary: Narrow Layers scope for now to three core functions: councils with Gemini/Claude/Codex, Memoryport-based continuity, and GitNexus-based codebase understanding.

payload.rationale: Triumvirate is the destination architecture; Layers should accelerate and de-risk it by proving workflows, memory models, and graph-aware tooling before promotion.
payload.summary: Treat Layers as builder tooling/proving ground for Triumvirate rather than a competing end-state system.
payload.title: Treat Layers as builder tooling/proving ground for Triumvirate rather than a competing end-st...

payload.rationale: Structured records preserve auditability, editability, and schema stability while still allowing semantic recall via derived retrieval text and embeddings.
payload.summary: Canonical curated memories should be structured records, not vectors as source of truth; semantic embeddings are derived retrieval artifacts.
payload.title: Canonical curated memories should be structured records, not vectors as source of truth

payload.impact: The user explicitly set the rule: if it can reasonably be built in Rust, build it in Rust; build software, not sandcastles.
payload.summary: Prefer Rust for durable systems; use scripting only for glue or temporary scaffolding.
payload.title: Prefer Rust for durable systems

payload.rationale: Ambient config resolution was unreliable; explicit config made retrieval work correctly with Ollama-backed embeddings.
payload.summary: Memoryport should be integrated through the real semantic retrieval path using explicit config (`uc -c ~/.memoryport/uc.toml`) and only fall back to local JSONL records when needed.

payload.rationale: Graph-aware routing and context are already valuable; deeper operational use is the clearest way to reduce codebase guessing and breakage.

payload.rationale: Observed failures in the current council process included weak critique discipline, role drift, orchestration fragility, and unclear convergence.
